---
id: claim-instruction
title: "Claim an instruction"
description: "Claims a PENDING instruction for the authenticated trader. Returns 409 if already claimed."
sidebar_label: "Claim an instruction"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Claim an instruction"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/instructions/{id}/claim"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Claims a PENDING instruction for the authenticated trader. Returns 409 if already claimed.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
